name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch - Beef Chunks in Gravy 85g
description: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch - Beef Chunks in Jelly , fully-balanced, beef protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4,5 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.3 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) - 15 mg/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 250 IU/kg Copper - 1 mg/kg Manganese - 1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Biotin - 20g/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Beef 5% min.), minerals, inulin (0.1%).
